decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_12-webster-ave) is its own record, and the canonical registry entry project_12-webster-ave already includes source_id 2013_03_sbs_webster_bx_cb5 in its source_ids list and has the matching alias project_webster-ave-sbs-2013-03-cb5. The observation already resolves to this canonical record. No different existing registry record is a closer match — the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service is uniquely captured by project_12-webster-ave. Per the rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.
